action.reasoning: Observation: Beam search improved exprate to 0.1293. Analysis: The model capacity can be increased to improve performance. I will increase d_model to 512 and num_decoder_layers to 6. I will also use a smaller learning rate for the pretrained encoder to preserve its features, and increase the batch size to 24 to speed up training. I will train for 80 epochs since we have enough time budget (~2.76 hours left, estimated time ~1.2 hours). Decision: Update model.py, train.py, and predict.py, then train and evaluate.
